THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIRDOFSKY, TANJA HAMID, TERRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: \30 COLE ST, #2, S.F, CA. $4,245.95 RENT, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,095.95, STAYED UNTIL FEB-28-1994, IF DEFS. VACATE 2-28-94 & RETURN KEYS TO PL. ATTY. BY 3-1-94 10AM, ALL R&D, ATTY FEES & COSTS WVD. PL. RETAINS SEC. DEP. PL. WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISM W/PREJUDICE.

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER, CALENDAR OF FEB-10-1994, DENIED TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO AMOUNT OF RENT DUE. CONFLICT IN EVIDENCE: DEFT DECLARATION PARAGRAPH 3 EXH 1 VS PLTFF DECLARATION PARAGRAPHS 3-5.

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/PAUL FONG AS COUNSEL. DEF. TANJA SIRDOFSKY PRESENT & IN PRO PER. DEF. HAMID NOT PRESENT & IN PRO PER. PL. WIT, LILA LOUIE, S&E. PL. EXH.#1, 3-DAY NOTICE, ID & INTO EVID. JUDGMENT FOR PL.- RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 130 COLE ST, #2, S.F, CA. - $4,245.95 RENT & DAMAGES - $100 COSTS - ATTY. FEES WVD. - WRIT TO ISSSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 2-28-94. JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED AT HIS TIME, HOWEVER, IF DEFENDANTS VACATE BY 2-28-94, MIDNIGHT & RETURN KEYS TO MR. FONG'S OFFICE BY 10AM, 3-1-94, PL. WILL WAIVE ALL RENT & DAMAGES & COSTS & S/A JUDGMENMT & DISM. THIS ACTION. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
